productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Green Limnos Casual Shoes
description: Green casual shoes from puma with a breathable canvas upper for style and comfort Branding on front seam, brand name tag on tongue and branding printed on the heel guard Breathable fabric lining and a cushioned footbed for all-day comfort. TPU and EVA midsole combined to give you support and ample cushioning Textured durable rubber outsole for maximum traction and grip
